name: Scenario Planning
summary: Model best, base, and worst case financial scenarios to prepare for uncertainty and make decisions with confidence.
whenToUseIt: Before major spending decisions, during fundraising, or when external conditions are changing.
steps: Define your base case (current trajectory continues)
Define your worst case (what happens if revenue drops 20-30%?)
Define your best case (what happens if revenue grows 50%+?)
For each scenario, calculate: monthly cash position, runway, and key decision points
Identify trigger points (what signals tell you which scenario is playing out?)
Pre-commit to actions for each scenario (so you act on data, not emotion)
example: Base: $50K MRR growing 10%/month, 12-month runway. Worst: growth stalls, runway drops to 8 months — trigger: cut 2 non-essential hires. Best: growing 15%/month, profitable in 6 months — trigger: accelerate hiring.
